ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "unit_volume" REAL /* Unit volume of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is organic */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country ID of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the time period */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the time period */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the time period */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the day is a weekend */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the transaction */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the transaction occurred */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period when the transaction occurred */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the product in the transaction */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume of the product in the transaction */,
  "small_bags" REAL /* Number of small bags in the transaction */,
  "large_bags" REAL /* Number of large bags in the transaction */,
  "xlarge_bags" REAL /* Number of extra-large bags in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the transaction */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source ID of the transaction data */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data is estimated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., conventional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transaction type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_type_links" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id", "transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
